context: Tests whether the answer corrects Swift Charts angle selection semantics for SectorMark.

checklist.name: Angle Value Semantics
checklist.description: States that chartAngleSelection(value:) binds the selected plottable angle value rather than the sector's category string.

checklist.name: Numeric Binding
checklist.description: Replaces the String? selection binding with a numeric angle binding such as Double?.

checklist.name: Category Mapping
checklist.description: Maps the selected angle through cumulative sales/value ranges to derive the selected product or category.

checklist.name: Sector Readability
checklist.description: Keeps SectorMark guidance such as positive values, limiting to 5-7 sectors, or grouping small slices into Other.

checklist.name: Chart-Owned Fix
checklist.description: Treats this as a Swift Charts selection semantics issue rather than routing the primary fix to generic SwiftUI state management.
